context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the otp-essentials instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY GenServer, Supervisor, Task, or Agent module.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always use `@impl true`** before GenServer/Agent callbacks (init, handle_call, handle_cast, handle_info, terminate)

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `GenServer.call` for request/response, `GenServer.cast` for fire-and-forget** — never cast when you need a result

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always define a public API wrapping GenServer calls** — callers should never use `GenServer.call(pid, ...)` directly

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Task.async`/`Task.await` with bounded timeouts** — never `Task.async` without a corresponding `Task.await` or `Task.yield`

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Task.Supervisor`** for fire-and-forget supervised work

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Prefer ETS over a bottleneck GenServer** for shared read-heavy state — one GenServer serializes all access

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Always wrap GenServer calls behind a public module API. Callers should not know they're talking to a GenServer.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Never block in `init/1`. Use `handle_continue` for expensive setup.

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define children** — list in dependency order (dependencies first)
